study_title: Antennal Transcriptomics Reveal Molecular Insights into the Waggle Dance Context in Apis mellifera
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera: adult antennae
design: Total RNA was extracted in 250 L of TRIzol reagent and resuspended in 20 L DEPC-treated water (Life Technologies). RNA integrity and quality were assessed employing a 1% agarose electrophoresis gel and an Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies). Library construction and high-throughput sequencing services were hired at Novogene Corporation Inc. (Sacramento, USA). A total of 11 cDNA libraries were constructed using the NEB Next Ultra RNA Library Prep Kit (New England Biolabs) with an insert length of 250-300 base pairs (bp). The libraries were sequenced using Illumina NovaSeq 6000 equipment (paired-end 150 bp)
sample_description: Total RNA was extracted using Trizol from a pool of adult antennae

study_title: Early exposure to linalool modifies behavioural arousal and gene transcription in honey bees
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera adult antennae
design: Antennal samples were collected on day 18 to evaluate the long-term effects of early olfactory experiences on gene expression. Each sample, composed of 30 antennae (10 from each colony), was homogenized, and total RNA was extracted using TRIzol and resuspended in DEPC-treated water. RNA integrity and quality were checked using agarose gel electrophoresis and an Agilent Bioanalyzer. For sequencing, 10 cDNA libraries were prepared using the NEB Next Ultra RNA Library Prep Kit, with an insert size of 250-300 base pairs. The libraries were sequenced by Novogene Corporation using Illumina NovaSeq 4000, achieving a depth of at least 20 million paired-end reads per library.
sample_description: Total RNA was extracted using Trizol from a pool of 30 adult antennae that were dissected on day 17. This group was not exposed to scent food.
